author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Start Sequence Reward Distribution Update

Hi Everyone!

We know you’re all expecting Start Sequence rewards today so we want to give you all an update.

Due to the complexity of deployment of the high number of assets, the release of the rewards is targeted for between today, February 10, and Monday, February 13, 2023. The availability of rewards will be announced on the official Star Atlas Twitter and Discord.

 | Read more about what rewards will be claimable in the coming days: https://medium.com/star-atlas/claiming-rewards-start-sequence-652636d69dc9
